nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Add autoresearch-style iteration to solution-simulation-loop: onTweakFix callback, in-memory rollback, TSV logging, when-stuck protocol for Phase 4.5
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Refactor solution-simulation-loop.cjs to accept an onTweakFix callback for evolving fix ideas between iterations, add in-memory consequence model rollback, TSV-as-memory logging, and when-stuck protocol after 3+ same-gate failures.
out_of_scope: Changes to the bug reproduction loop (autoresearch-refine.cjs — done in quick-348)
Changes to convergence-gate-runner.cjs, intent-normalizer.cjs, or consequence-model-generator.cjs internals
Interactive user prompts during the simulation loop
New formal model creation or modification
